title: Production Readiness Gap Report v2
context: GrantLayer is publicly available on GitHub at https://github.com/Discodone/grantlayer.git in a Developer Preview / controlled-pilot posture. The sequence GL-191 through GL-198 delivered the public hardening sequence culminating in the controlled preview boundary pack (GL-198). GL-199 consolidates all remaining production-readiness gaps after that sequence. This is a review/docs/test artifact only.
executive_summary: GrantLayer has completed the public Developer Preview hardening sequence GL-191 through GL-198. The Developer Preview posture is solid: the public snapshot is clean, the examples are deterministic and verified, and the feedback and security reporting routing are established. The controlled preview is allowed under strict boundaries (GL-198). Production SaaS readiness is not claimed and is not achievable without completing the P0 and P1 hardening gates documented in this report. All production blockers are mapped, classified, and assigned to recommended follow-up issues.

developer_preview.rationale: Public snapshot clean; examples deterministic and verified; feedback routing established; safety/claim gate passed; smoke matrix passed

controlled_preview.rationale: Strict boundaries required (GL-198); synthetic data only; no real data; no production deployments

production_saas.rationale: Multiple P0 blockers remain: tenant isolation, production auth, secrets, deployment hardening, observability, backup/DR, PostgreSQL CI, compliance

real_customer_data.rationale: No tenant isolation; no encryption at rest guarantee; data safety boundary not met

private_grant_institutional_data.rationale: Compliance requirements not met; no institutional data handling certification

official_sdk_package.rationale: No pip package published; no PyPI release; no stable API v1 contract

readiness_dimensions.name: public developer preview
readiness_dimensions.rationale: Public snapshot clean; examples deterministic and verified; feedback routing established; safety/claim gate passed; smoke matrix passed
readiness_dimensions.evidence: GL-195 scanner gate, GL-196 smoke matrix, GL-197 smoke checks (MATCH + DIFF CLEAN), GL-198 boundary pack
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Continue Developer Preview; maintain smoke matrix and safety gate on each public snapshot update

readiness_dimensions.name: controlled preview boundary
readiness_dimensions.rationale: Controlled preview allowed under strict boundaries (GL-198); synthetic data only; no real data; no production deployments; cautions: tenant isolation not implemented, API has no stability commitment, sdk/ name may imply more maturity
readiness_dimensions.evidence: GL-198 decision: controlled_preview_allowed_with_strict_boundaries; GL-198 boundary doc published
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Reference GL-198 boundary doc for all controlled preview communications; enforce data and participant boundaries
readiness_dimensions.recommended_issue: None — boundary established; next is controlled reviewer feedback round

readiness_dimensions.name: production SaaS
readiness_dimensions.rationale: Multiple P0 blockers remain: tenant isolation not implemented, production auth not implemented, secret management not complete, deployment hardening not specified, observability not implemented, backup/DR not defined, PostgreSQL CI not established, compliance not assessed
readiness_dimensions.evidence: docs/production_hardening_roadmap.md section 4; docs/full_product_readiness_gap_review.md (GL-101); GL-199 blocker table PB-001 through PB-008
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Do not claim production SaaS readiness; complete P0 blockers in sequence before next readiness gate

readiness_dimensions.name: tenant/workspace isolation
readiness_dimensions.rationale: Tenant isolation is not implemented; all data in single namespace; implementation is a production blocker and data-safety blocker
readiness_dimensions.evidence: docs/tenant_workspace_boundary_decision.md (GL-132): 'no tenant/workspace implementation is added'; SECURITY.md section 6; GL-198 boundary pack
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Implement tenant/workspace data model and enforcement before any real customer data is introduced
readiness_dimensions.recommended_issue: Tenant isolation design and implementation issue (GL-200+)

readiness_dimensions.name: auth and token handling
readiness_dimensions.rationale: Admin-token/operator-token only; no OAuth, JWT, SSO, or HSM-backed key management; production auth architecture not defined
readiness_dimensions.evidence: docs/production_auth_operator_access_design.md (design only); docs/production_hardening_roadmap.md section 4
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Define and implement production auth architecture (OAuth 2.0, JWT, SSO decision record)

readiness_dimensions.name: production secrets/configuration
readiness_dimensions.rationale: Demo Ed25519 keypair in repo as placeholder; no vault, rotation, or HSM; .env.example documents placeholder secrets
readiness_dimensions.evidence: docs/secret_management_baseline_design.md (design only); docs/production_hardening_roadmap.md section 4
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Replace demo keypair with managed secret strategy; implement rotation and access-control boundaries

readiness_dimensions.name: persistence/database/Postgres readiness
readiness_dimensions.rationale: SQLite is default; PostgreSQL support exists but is not CI-gated; migration rollback not tested in CI; no production connection pooling baseline
readiness_dimensions.evidence: docs/production_hardening_roadmap.md section 4; scripts/run-postgres-tests.sh exists but not in CI gate; docker-compose.postgres.yml is local only
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Make PostgreSQL CI-gated primary database; test migration rollback; define connection pooling baseline
readiness_dimensions.recommended_issue: PostgreSQL CI and persistence hardening issue (GL-200+)

readiness_dimensions.name: audit immutability/tamper evidence
readiness_dimensions.rationale: Audit hash chain and tamper-evident records implemented and tested; production-level immutability guarantees (backup, write-lock, replication) require additional hardening
readiness_dimensions.evidence: backend/tests/test_gl099_transactional_audit_consistency.py; backend/tests/test_gl100_grant_lifecycle_audit_tamper_guard.py; docs/audit_hash_chain_write_lock.md; docs/audit_log_immutability_review.md
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Document current audit guarantees vs production-level requirements; identify gaps before production claim

readiness_dimensions.name: API contract/OpenAPI completeness
readiness_dimensions.rationale: OpenAPI contract exists as local draft; no stability commitment; no external hosting; no versioning policy; sufficient for Developer Preview evaluation only
readiness_dimensions.evidence: docs/openapi.yaml (local draft); GL-197 API assessment: ready_with_cautions; no API v1 freeze criteria defined
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Define API v1 freeze criteria, versioning policy, and external stability commitment before SDK or production integration claims
readiness_dimensions.recommended_issue: API contract/OpenAPI review and freeze issue (GL-200+)

readiness_dimensions.name: SDK/package maturity
readiness_dimensions.rationale: No official SDK or pip package; minimal local Python client wrapper is local reference only; no pyproject.toml; no PyPI release; no version policy
readiness_dimensions.evidence: GL-197 decision: api_first_agent_examples_now_sdk_later; sdk/python/README.md: 'No pip package is published'
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Defer SDK packaging until API v1 stability commitment and demonstrated external demand; do not claim SDK availability
readiness_dimensions.recommended_issue: SDK prototype decision and implementation issue (future)

readiness_dimensions.name: agent workflow readiness
readiness_dimensions.rationale: Agent entry points (AGENTS.md, llms.txt, llms-full.txt) are ready; two deterministic no-install examples verified; LangGraph/LangChain example exists; standalone agent-to-API example is missing; llms.txt Next Steps reference is stale
readiness_dimensions.evidence: GL-197 agent workflow assessment: ready_with_cautions; GL-196 smoke matrix; GL-188 first output helper (MATCH)
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Add standalone agent-to-API integration example; update llms.txt Next Steps reference

readiness_dimensions.name: demo endpoint safety
readiness_dimensions.rationale: Demo endpoint safety guard in place (GL-190); disabled by default; non-local exposure blocked at startup; error message contains no secrets
readiness_dimensions.evidence: docs/demo_endpoint_safety_guard.md; GRANTLAYER_ENABLE_DEMO_ENDPOINTS=false default; GRANTLAYER_ALLOW_PUBLIC_DEMO_ENDPOINTS guard; GL-190 tests
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Maintain demo endpoint guard; document in any future deployment guides

readiness_dimensions.name: data privacy/customer data readiness
readiness_dimensions.rationale: No real customer data allowed; no tenant isolation; no encryption at rest guarantee; all examples use synthetic identifiers only
readiness_dimensions.evidence: SECURITY.md section 6; GL-198 boundary pack forbidden data table; GL-199 blocker PB-001
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Do not accept real customer data until tenant isolation and encryption at rest are implemented

readiness_dimensions.name: private grant/institutional data readiness
readiness_dimensions.rationale: Private grants and institutional records must not enter the preview environment; compliance requirements not yet met; no institutional data handling certification
readiness_dimensions.evidence: GL-198 boundary pack forbidden data table; GL-199 blocker PB-008; docs/production_hardening_roadmap.md section 4
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Do not accept private grants or institutional records until compliance gap assessment and hardening gates are complete

readiness_dimensions.name: observability/logging
readiness_dimensions.rationale: Structured logging helpers exist but not integrated into production observability stack; no metrics, alerting, or tracing
readiness_dimensions.evidence: backend/src/structured_logging.py (helpers only); docs/production_hardening_roadmap.md section 4: 'Observability is not implemented'
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Implement metrics, alerting, and logging pipeline integration before production deployment

readiness_dimensions.name: deployment/ops
readiness_dimensions.rationale: No containers, TLS, load balancing, orchestration, or environment-specific deployment guidance exists for production deployment
readiness_dimensions.evidence: docs/production_hardening_roadmap.md section 4: 'Deployment hardening is not specified'; docs/deployment/ is design reference only
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Define and document target deployment environment before production claim

readiness_dimensions.name: backup/restore/DR
readiness_dimensions.rationale: No automated backup, point-in-time recovery, or DR runbooks; backup/restore minimum drill exists as design reference only
readiness_dimensions.evidence: docs/backup_restore_minimum_drill.md (design); docs/production_hardening_roadmap.md section 4: 'Backup/restore is not defined'
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Define backup strategy, test DR runbooks, implement automated backup before production data is stored

readiness_dimensions.name: rate limiting/abuse prevention
readiness_dimensions.rationale: No rate limiting or brute-force mitigation layer; acceptable for local/controlled preview but blocks production API exposure
readiness_dimensions.evidence: GL-101 full product readiness gap review; no rate-limiting middleware identified
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Implement rate limiting and abuse prevention before production API exposure

readiness_dimensions.name: CORS/public exposure
readiness_dimensions.rationale: CORS hardening addressed for local demo (GL-095); production CORS policy for hosted service not specified
readiness_dimensions.evidence: GL-095 CORS hardening (backend/tests/test_gl095_cors_origin_hardening.py); no hosted origin allowlist policy defined
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Define and implement production CORS policy with explicit origin allowlist before production hosting

readiness_dimensions.name: security reporting
readiness_dimensions.rationale: GitHub Security Advisories routing established; SECURITY.md documents reporting path; GL-192 public feedback infrastructure confirms routing
readiness_dimensions.evidence: SECURITY.md section 2; docs/public_feedback_infrastructure_pack.md (GL-192); GL-195 claim consistency gate
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Maintain security reporting routing on all future public snapshot updates

readiness_dimensions.name: public claim consistency
readiness_dimensions.rationale: Public safety/claim consistency gate passed (GL-195); forbidden claims documented (GL-198); allowed claims documented (GL-198); no overclaiming found in GL-195 through GL-198 review; README 'Python SDK' label needs minor qualifier (GL-199-F013)
readiness_dimensions.evidence: GL-195 scanner gate; GL-198 public claim boundary table
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Enforce forbidden claim list on any future public communications; fix README 'Python SDK' label qualifier
readiness_dimensions.recommended_issue: README label fix (MG-005); small docs update

readiness_dimensions.name: test suite health
readiness_dimensions.rationale: Full backend suite has 23 pre-existing scope-guard false positive failures; test suite is otherwise healthy with 7413 tests total; false positives reduce CI signal quality
readiness_dimensions.evidence: GL-198 post-merge: 7413 tests, 23 failures, 217 skipped — all 23 failures confirmed as pre-existing scope-guard FPs
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Audit and fix scope-guard test patterns to eliminate false positives; track count to ensure it does not grow

readiness_dimensions.name: public snapshot safety
readiness_dimensions.rationale: Public snapshot verified clean: no internal paths, no real secrets, no private data — confirmed by GL-195 scanner gate and GL-196 smoke matrix
readiness_dimensions.evidence: GL-195 public_safety_scanner_claim_consistency_gate.md; GL-196 public_smoke_matrix_pack.md; GL-198 safety confirmations
readiness_dimensions.recommended_action: Re-run scanner gate and smoke matrix on each public snapshot update

findings.summary: Tenant/workspace isolation is not implemented. All grant records, evidence, audit events, and operator identities exist in a single shared namespace.
findings.evidence: docs/tenant_workspace_boundary_decision.md (GL-132): 'no tenant/workspace implementation is added.' SECURITY.md section 6: 'Tenant isolation not implemented.' GL-198 boundary pack. No implementation issue has closed this gap.
findings.recommended_action: Create a tenant/workspace design and implementation issue. Implement tenant data model, migration, and enforcement before any real customer data is introduced.
findings.recommended_issue: Tenant isolation design and implementation issue (GL-200+)

findings.summary: Production authentication is not implemented. Admin-token and operator-token only; no OAuth 2.0, JWT, SSO, mutual TLS, or HSM-backed key management.
findings.evidence: docs/production_auth_operator_access_design.md (design only); docs/production_hardening_roadmap.md section 4: 'Production auth is not implemented.'
findings.recommended_action: Define and implement production auth architecture (OAuth 2.0, JWT, SSO decision record).

findings.summary: Production secret management is not complete. Demo Ed25519 keypair in repository as placeholder; no vault integration, secret rotation, HSM, or encryption-at-rest guarantee.
findings.evidence: docs/secret_management_baseline_design.md (design only); docs/production_hardening_roadmap.md section 4: 'Production secrets are not managed.' .env.example documents placeholder key paths.
findings.recommended_action: Replace demo keypair with managed secret strategy; implement rotation and access-control boundaries.

findings.summary: Deployment hardening is not specified. No containers, load balancing, TLS termination, orchestration, or environment-specific configuration guidance exists.
findings.evidence: docs/production_hardening_roadmap.md section 4: 'Deployment hardening is not specified.' No Dockerfile for production use. docker-compose.yml is for local development only.
findings.recommended_action: Define target runtime, container strategy, network topology, and environment separation before production deployment.

findings.summary: PostgreSQL CI path is not established as the primary production database. SQLite is default. PostgreSQL support exists but is not CI-gated. Migration rollback not tested in CI.
findings.evidence: docs/production_hardening_roadmap.md section 4: 'PostgreSQL CI is not established.' scripts/run-postgres-tests.sh exists but not in CI gate. docker-compose.postgres.yml is local only.
findings.recommended_action: Make PostgreSQL CI-gated primary database; test migration rollback; define connection pooling baseline.
findings.recommended_issue: PostgreSQL CI and persistence hardening issue (GL-200+)

findings.summary: Observability is not implemented. No metrics, logging pipelines, alerting, or tracing beyond local structured logging helpers.
findings.evidence: docs/production_hardening_roadmap.md section 4: 'Observability is not implemented.' backend/src/structured_logging.py exists as helpers only.
findings.recommended_action: Implement metrics, alerting, and logging pipeline integration before production deployment.

findings.summary: Backup, restore, and disaster recovery are not defined. No automated backup, point-in-time recovery, or DR runbooks exist for production data.
findings.evidence: docs/backup_restore_minimum_drill.md (design reference only); docs/production_hardening_roadmap.md section 4: 'Backup/restore is not defined.'
findings.recommended_action: Define backup strategy, test DR runbooks, and implement automated backup before production data is stored.

findings.summary: Compliance and institutional readiness has not been assessed. No regulatory framework mapping, compliance gap assessment, or institutional data handling certification exists.
findings.evidence: docs/production_hardening_roadmap.md section 4: 'Compliance/legal review is not certification.' No compliance documents beyond SECURITY.md data handling rules.
findings.recommended_action: Commission a compliance gap assessment covering relevant regulatory frameworks before institutional deployment.

findings.summary: The API contract has no stability commitment, versioning policy, or deprecation cycle. The OpenAPI contract is a local draft only.
findings.evidence: GL-197 API assessment: 'No stability commitment made.' docs/openapi.yaml local draft. No external hosting. No API v1 freeze criteria defined.
findings.recommended_action: Define API v1 freeze criteria, versioning policy, and external stability commitment.
findings.recommended_issue: API contract/OpenAPI review and freeze issue (GL-200+)

findings.summary: No official SDK or pip package is available. The minimal local Python client wrapper is a local convenience module only.
findings.evidence: GL-197 decision: api_first_agent_examples_now_sdk_later. sdk/python/README.md: 'No pip package is published.' No pyproject.toml. No PyPI release.
findings.recommended_action: Defer SDK packaging until API v1 stability commitment and demonstrated external demand.
findings.recommended_issue: SDK prototype decision and implementation issue (future)

findings.summary: The full backend test suite has 23 pre-existing scope-guard false positive failures, reducing CI signal quality.
findings.evidence: GL-198 post-merge: 7413 tests, 23 failures, 217 skipped — all 23 failures confirmed as pre-existing scope-guard FPs. Same count in GL-196 and GL-197.
findings.recommended_action: Audit and fix scope-guard test patterns to eliminate false positives. Track count to ensure it does not grow.

findings.summary: No rate limiting or abuse prevention layer exists for public API endpoints. Acceptable for local/controlled-preview use but blocks production API exposure.
findings.evidence: GL-101 full product readiness gap review. No rate-limiting middleware identified in backend/src/server.py.
findings.recommended_action: Implement rate limiting and abuse prevention before production API exposure.

findings.summary: README Developer entry path table labels Step 5 as 'Python SDK' without a qualifier, which may set incorrect expectations about published package availability.
findings.evidence: GL-197-F002, GL-198-F002. README.md Developer entry path table, Step 5: 'Python SDK.' SDK README correctly states 'No pip package is published' but the table label alone is ambiguous.
findings.recommended_action: Add qualifier to README: change 'Python SDK' to 'Minimal Python client (local only, not published)' or equivalent.

findings.summary: llms.txt Next Steps section still references GL-193 as an upcoming issue, but GL-193 was merged and published. Carried from GL-195-F003 through GL-198-F003.
findings.evidence: llms.txt Next Steps: references GL-193 as upcoming. GL-193 merged and published.
findings.recommended_action: Update llms.txt Next Steps to reference current roadmap. Minimal one-line fix.
findings.recommended_issue: Small docs update (bundle with GL-199P or next snapshot push)

findings.summary: Quickstart docs (ten-minute quickstart and agent quickstart) lack a prominent tenant isolation caveat at the top.
findings.evidence: GL-198-F004. docs/ten_minute_quickstart.md and docs/agent_quickstart.md do not surface the tenant isolation caveat prominently.
findings.recommended_action: Add a one-line Developer Preview caveat to the top of each quickstart.

production_blockers.name: Tenant/workspace isolation not implemented
production_blockers.why_blocks: All data in a single namespace; real customer data would commingle; no data boundary between tenants
production_blockers.resolution: Implement tenant/workspace data model and enforcement

production_blockers.name: Production auth not implemented
production_blockers.why_blocks: Admin-token/operator-token only; no OAuth, JWT, SSO, or IAM; no production identity model

production_blockers.name: Production secret management not complete
production_blockers.why_blocks: Demo Ed25519 keypair in repo; no vault integration, rotation, or HSM

production_blockers.name: Deployment hardening not specified
production_blockers.why_blocks: No containers, TLS termination, orchestration, or env separation

production_blockers.name: Observability not implemented
production_blockers.why_blocks: No metrics, alerting, logging pipelines, or tracing; cannot operate production service

production_blockers.name: Backup/restore and DR not defined
production_blockers.why_blocks: No automated backup, point-in-time recovery, or DR runbooks; unacceptable for production data
production_blockers.resolution: Define backup strategy + test DR runbooks

production_blockers.name: PostgreSQL CI path not established
production_blockers.why_blocks: SQLite is default; PostgreSQL not CI-gated; migration rollback not tested; no production DB guarantee
production_blockers.resolution: Make PostgreSQL CI-gated primary database; test migration rollback

production_blockers.name: Compliance/institutional readiness not claimed
production_blockers.why_blocks: Regulatory, legal, or compliance-sensitive requirements not assessed; cannot make institutional claims

go_no_go.Controlled Preview: go with strict boundaries (GL-198 boundaries apply)

next_recommended_step: GL-199 Combined Merge-and-Publish for Production Readiness Gap Report v2
non_goals: implement tenant isolation, production auth, secret management, or any other backend feature
change OpenAPI, migrations, DB/schema, or dependency manifests
publish packages to PyPI or any registry
push to GitHub or change GitHub visibility
create or modify GitHub labels/issues via API
send reviewer outreach or contact reviewers
request real customer data, private grants, or secrets
